sglang.title: [Performance] Decode Offload improves the long texts performance 100% through dynamic block offload.
sglang.author: yuyu5333
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Changing the offload process to dynamic on-the-fly offloading significantly increases the number of requests that decode nodes can process in parallel. On H20-96GiB devices, the concurrency count can be more than doubled, and the end-to-end performance is doubled. The deployed test model

sglang.title: Fix streaming session with paged KV cache (SWA/MLA)
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fix streaming sessions crashing on models with page_size > 1 (SWA, MLA, etc.).
Root cause: SessionAwareCache.match_prefix returns device_indices of length kv_committed_len (not page-aligned), which was assigned to req.cache_protected_len, violating the page-alignment invariant.
Fix: Pass slo

slot.req_pool_idx is not None requires knowing that None means "no KV held" — slot.is_holding_kv makes intent immediately clear

sglang.title: Batch `copy_` with `torch._foreach_copy_`
sglang.author: mattteochen
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Multiple inplace copy_ calls can be batched together with torch._foreach_copy_, issuing fewer CUDA API calls. This is crucial for lowering host latency during decode steps, where GPU work per copy is small but the cumulative kernel-launch overhead is significant.
Modifications
Refactored

sglang.title: [NPU] qwen3_vl encoder support graph
sglang.author: cen121212
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR adds NPU graph support for the Qwen3-VL vision encoder to reduce runtime launch overhead and improve inference efficiency on Ascend devices.
The change is especially useful for small-image workloads, where launch overhead is a larger portion of total latency.

Purpose
This PR replaces LaunchEngineClient (a null object for EngineClient) with a proper standalone preprocessing class, OpenAIServingRender, and wires it into the FastAPI server via a dedicated render path. The result is a clean vllm launch render command that spins up a CPU-only server capable o

vllm.title: Add support for ModelOpt MXFP8 MoE models
vllm.author: danisereb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Follow up to these PRs:
#33786
#35053
vLLM recently upgraded flashinfer to version 0.6.4.
Flashinfer 0.6.4 includes a new MXFP8 TRTLLM MoE kernel:
flashinfer-ai/flashinfer#2505
This PR adds support for ModelOpt MXFP8 MoE models using the new kernel.
At this time only gated MoE is supported.

vllm.title: [cudagraph] fix cudagraph warning in deepseekv32
vllm.author: ZJY0516
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR fixes Dynamo partitioning for DeepSeek-V3.2 when an empty allocation is isolated into its own subgraph.
Previously, FX splitting could produce:
submod_1: torch.ops.vllm.sparse_attn_indexer(...)
submod_2: torch.empty(...)
submod_3: torch.ops.vllm.unified_mla_attention_with_output(...)
